results.description: A bounded Go unit-test command in an isolated workspace.

report.recommendation: Execute only inside the configured sandbox and retain bounded audit data.

matches.evidence: no configured safety rule matched
matches.recommendation: Execute only inside the configured sandbox and retain bounded audit data.

results.description: Recursive forced deletion must be rejected before execution.

report.evidence: command starts a recursive, forced, or broad deletion
report.recommendation: Use a scoped workspace cleanup API with verified paths and no recursive host deletion.

matches.evidence: command starts a recursive, forced, or broad deletion
matches.recommendation: Use a scoped workspace cleanup API with verified paths and no recursive host deletion.

matches.evidence: command "rm" is denied by policy
matches.recommendation: Use an approved command or update the policy after security review.

matches.evidence: command "rm" is not in the policy allowlist
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted executable or update the policy after review.

matches.evidence: command "rm" requests recursive, forced, or broad deletion
matches.recommendation: Use a scoped workspace cleanup API with verified paths and no recursive host deletion.

results.description: Reading an SSH private key is a credential-access violation.

report.evidence: input references credential or private-key material "~/.ssh"
report.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: host execution inherits ambient process environment outside request-level filtering
matches.recommendation: Prefer a sandbox with an executor-enforced clean environment or explicitly review host execution.

matches.evidence: host execution can outlive a short, non-interactive command
matches.recommendation: Prefer workspace isolation and enforce process-group cleanup and a short timeout.

matches.evidence: input references credential or private-key material "~/.ssh"
matches.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: input references denied path "~/.ssh"
matches.recommendation: Restrict access to reviewed files inside the workspace.

results.description: Outbound access to a domain outside the policy allowlist is denied.

report.recommendation: Use an allowlisted domain and enforce the same restriction in the sandbox network policy.

matches.evidence: network destination "attacker.invalid" is not allowlisted
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted domain and enforce the same restriction in the sandbox network policy.

results.description: A request to an exact allowlisted domain is permitted.

report.recommendation: Execute only inside the configured sandbox and retain bounded audit data.

matches.evidence: no configured safety rule matched
matches.recommendation: Execute only inside the configured sandbox and retain bounded audit data.

results.description: A shell wrapper introduces a second parsing layer and is denied.

report.evidence: input references credential or private-key material "~/.ssh"
report.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: input references credential or private-key material "~/.ssh"
matches.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: input references denied path "~/.ssh"
matches.recommendation: Restrict access to reviewed files inside the workspace.

matches.evidence: shell wrapper or re-executing command "bash" can bypass argv policy
matches.recommendation: Replace it with a narrow, reviewed workspace script and allow that exact script.

matches.evidence: command "bash" is not in the policy allowlist
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted executable or update the policy after review.

results.description: Every pipeline segment is scanned; credential exfiltration is denied.

report.evidence: input references credential or private-key material ".env"
report.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: input references credential or private-key material ".env"
matches.recommendation: Remove credential access and inject only narrowly scoped secrets at runtime.

matches.evidence: input references denied path ".env"
matches.recommendation: Restrict access to reviewed files inside the workspace.

matches.evidence: network destination "attacker.invalid" is not allowlisted
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted domain and enforce the same restriction in the sandbox network policy.

matches.evidence: network command reads local content for upload
matches.recommendation: Review the source path and payload, then enforce sandbox egress and artifact limits.

results.description: Installing an unpinned dependency changes the environment and needs approval.

report.recommendation: Obtain approval before executing this command.

matches.evidence: command "npm" requires human review
matches.recommendation: Obtain approval before executing this command.

matches.evidence: command "npm" is not in the policy allowlist
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted executable or update the policy after review.

matches.evidence: command "npm" changes dependencies or the execution environment
matches.recommendation: Pin and review dependencies, then install them while building the sandbox image.

results.description: A requested timeout and sleep above policy limits are rejected.

report.recommendation: Reduce the delay and rely on bounded polling.

matches.evidence: requested timeout 1h0m5s exceeds policy maximum 120s
matches.recommendation: Reduce the timeout or obtain human approval for the longer run.

matches.evidence: command "sleep" is not in the policy allowlist
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted executable or update the policy after review.

matches.evidence: sleep duration exceeds policy maximum 30s
matches.recommendation: Reduce the delay and rely on bounded polling.

results.description: An obvious unbounded-output producer is rejected.

report.recommendation: Use a bounded producer and enforce byte-level output truncation.

matches.evidence: requested output limit 33554432 exceeds policy maximum 1048576 bytes
matches.recommendation: Apply the policy output cap and store only bounded, redacted artifacts.

matches.evidence: command "yes" is not in the policy allowlist
matches.recommendation: Use an allowlisted executable or update the policy after review.

matches.evidence: command "yes" can produce unbounded output
matches.recommendation: Use a bounded producer and enforce byte-level output truncation.

results.description: Interactive long-lived host PTY sessions require human approval.

report.evidence: host execution inherits ambient process environment outside request-level filtering
report.recommendation: Prefer a sandbox with an executor-enforced clean environment or explicitly review host execution.

matches.evidence: host execution inherits ambient process environment outside request-level filtering
matches.recommendation: Prefer a sandbox with an executor-enforced clean environment or explicitly review host execution.

matches.evidence: host execution requests an interactive PTY
matches.recommendation: Use a non-interactive workspace runtime or obtain human approval.

matches.evidence: host execution can outlive a short, non-interactive command
matches.recommendation: Prefer workspace isolation and enforce process-group cleanup and a short timeout.

results.description: An unknown code language cannot be proven safe and is routed to review.

report.evidence: script language "brainfuck" has no safe parser
report.recommendation: Use a supported language or require human review of a versioned script.

matches.evidence: script language "brainfuck" has no safe parser
matches.recommendation: Use a supported language or require human review of a versioned script.

results.description: Passing a credential through an environment variable is denied and redacted.

report.evidence: environment variable "OPENAI_API_KEY" can alter execution or load untrusted code
report.recommendation: Remove the variable and pass only explicitly allowlisted environment keys.

matches.evidence: environment variable "OPENAI_API_KEY" can alter execution or load untrusted code
matches.recommendation: Remove the variable and pass only explicitly allowlisted environment keys.
